text.message: Would rather have done with you oj
No we raced and I offered you a city
I don’t know what to say
I placed the first rd, I’m sorry if you see it any other way
Do. I see it as I was going there and you had the cut up. Then black took your spot and got a crazy benefit trade
I wanted to give you the ore
I didn’t rob you out of spite but can you at least see it that way
Will give some help to the port
Thank you red it doesn’t go unnoticed
It’s ok I’m in a good position
Red does not have a port
Yeah now he got 6 with one dev
blue can you take road soon?
well could be gg if he has vps
Can help with wood if you need it for rd
i meant to settle but devd by accident
then i didnt know where to go haha
